title: Appendix II. Al-Walid's Letter Appointing His Two Sons, alHakam and 'Uthman, as His Successors
description: Appendix II. Al-Walid's Letter Appointing His Two Sons, alHakam and 'Uthman, as His Successors. Recorded under the year 126 AH (744–745 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 26.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 26
